headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From CarMax’s Q2 Earnings Call
summary: CarMax’s second quarter results were met with a negative market reaction despite the company exceeding Wall Street’s revenue and profit expectations. Management attributed the disconnect to a combination of operational friction in the customer journey and ongoing cost pressures. CEO Keith Barr highlighted areas for improvement, noting, "Our core operations are not yet fast and efficient enough. Retail prices and selection must continue to improve, and our costs remain too high." The company also
